title: PII or Sensitive Data in Logs
description: Logging personally identifiable information (email, SSN, credit card numbers, passwords) violates OWASP A09:2021 (Security Logging and Monitoring Failures) and creates compliance liabilities under GDPR/CCPA.

finding.message: PII or sensitive data potentially logged at '{{token}}' in {{file}} at line {{line}}.

references: Implement a log sanitizer that redacts known PII fields before writing log records.
Use structured logging with field-level access control to prevent sensitive fields from reaching log aggregators.
Apply data minimization: log only what is necessary for security monitoring and incident response.
GDPR Article 5(1)(f) requires appropriate security for personal data processing, including logs.
